ques: Find the most download machine translation model on Huggingface which focuses on English and Japanese (en-ja) and report the evaluation metrics stated for it.
answer: The most-downloaded machine-translation model on Hugging Face covering English & Japanese is facebook/nllb-200-distilled-600M (~1.51M downloads). Its stated evaluation metrics are BLEU, spBLEU, and chrF++, plus human evaluation via the XSTS protocol and toxicity measurement, evaluated on the Flores-200 dataset.
